examples: A Nan salted duck was fermented by co-fermentation of Lactobacillus Plantarum.
A steady diet of Lactobacillus rhamnosus appears to reduce anxiety in mice.
There have been no reports of adverse events so far in human Lactobacillus reuteri studies.
Lactobacillus acidophilus is a friendly organism which helps the body fight disease and restores health.
According to Huffnagle, the best source of Lactobacillus and Bifidobacteria probiotics is probably refrigerated supplements, which provide a more concentrated dose and a reliable delivery system.
